name: Scribo
tagline: Smart shopping lists that know what you need.
description: A local-first Android app for managing household shopping. Maintain master lists of everything you regularly stock, enter what you currently have, and Scribo generates a trip-specific shopping list for exactly what's missing. Track items while shopping with partial buy support — buy less than needed and the remainder stays on the list automatically. Supports unit conversion across weight, volume, and count families.

name: CureFlow
tagline: Run your clinic. Not your spreadsheets.
description: Multi-tenant SaaS for veterinary clinics. Each clinic runs on its own subdomain with isolated data. Role-based access (Admin, Doctor, Receptionist) with timed edit windows, consultation sessions, billing with printable receipts, prescriptions, appointments, and a Super Admin layer to manage all tenants.

name: Dotfiles
description: Personal dotfiles for managing and reproducing my Linux development setup.

name: Attendify
description: Export CSV file exported from website, have an interactive attendance tracker

name: GhostFollow
tagline: Find the ghosts in your following list
description: A minimal tool that parses your Instagram data export and tells you who doesn’t follow you back.
